name: FlashVault MCP
tagline: The VIP x402 Flash Loan Profit Printer — agents pay you USDC to detect, simulate, generate calldata, and execute risk-free arbitrage.
description: FlashVault MCP is an x402-monetized Model Context Protocol server that gives AI agents real-time DeFi market intelligence and flash loan tooling on Base and Solana. Every tool call costs USDC, paid instantly on-chain to the server owner. No subscriptions, no API keys for agents — just pay-per-use USDC micropayments.

tools.name: get_market_data
tools.description: Real-time token prices, 24h change, and market cap via CoinGecko.

tools.name: scan_yield_opportunities
tools.description: Top DeFi yield pools by APY sourced from DeFiLlama.

tools.name: enrich_web_data
tools.description: Fetches and parses any public URL into clean text or JSON.

tools.name: detect_flash_arb_opportunities
tools.description: Scans Base + Solana DEXes for live arbitrage opportunities with net-profit estimates.

tools.name: simulate_flash_trade
tools.description: Dry-runs flash trade calldata on live chain state via eth_call.

tools.name: generate_flash_loan_calldata
tools.description: Encodes ready-to-sign Aave V3 flash loan calldata with arbitrage logic.

tools.name: execute_flash_loan_bundle
tools.description: Packages flash loan into a ready-to-submit EVM bundle with profit-share routing.
